item.title: [EU/CA][Web Hosting] - Internal DNS Database Service Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 18, 08:00 UTC  -  May 20, 15:00 UTC

Apr 20, 13:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Database offer.

Start time : 18/05/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will upgrade the internal DNS supporting our database services.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web hosting] - Clusters Maintenance notification
item.description:
May 4, 13:12 UTC
Update - Scheduled maintenance is still in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 4, 12:55 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 4, 12:52 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 04/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : Session reset due to customer change on the web interface.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an upgrade for Web Hosting offer.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name Incident Notification on .TL and .DK
item.description:
May 4, 08:34 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .DK domains since 04/05/2026 08:10 UTC.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 08:21 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .TL Domains offer, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks on .TL domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/05/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .TL domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .TL domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz1831 / Cluster 106 Logs & Stats Incident Notification
item.description:
May 4, 07:13 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Logs & Stats Web Hosting offer on Filerz1831 / Cluster 106 in GRA has been resolved.

Start time : 04/05/2026 06:08 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 06:26 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The logs & stats were not accessible.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their logs and their stats on the Web Hosting offer.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 06:29 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Logs & Stats Web Hosting offer on Filerz1831 / Cluster 106 in GRA.

Start time : 04/05/2026 06:08 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters incident notification
item.description:
May 3, 20:19 UTC
Identified - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/05/2026 10:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some websites hosted on clusters in GRA might be temporarily unavailable for a limited time.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on clusters in GRA for a limited time.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 3, 01:32 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 03/05/2026 01:16 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/05/2026 20:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some websites hosted on clusters in GRA were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on clusters in GRA.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 3, 00:21 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/05/2026 20:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some websites hosted on clusters in GRA are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on clusters in GRA.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 3, 00:19 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Web Hosting offer on clusters in GRA region.

Start time : 02/05/2026 20:56 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra incident notification
item.description:
May 2, 21:09 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on mailstore25 offering has been resolved.

Start time : 02/05/2026 20:03 UTC
End time : 02/05/2026 20:57 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 2, 20:20 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on the specific mailstore25.
Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/05/2026 20:03 UTC
Impacted Service(s) :Some Zimbra mailboxes located in mailstore25 are temporarily inaccessible.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their mailboxes.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra incident notification
item.description:

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/05/2026 04:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their mailboxes Zimbra.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to read or send email.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 2, 08:21 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/05/2026 04:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their mailboxes Zimbra.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to read or send email.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster024/124 maintenance notification
item.description:
May 1, 03:19 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 30, 20:31 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 30, 20:30 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer on the cluster024/124.

Start time : 30/04/2026 20:30 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 20:00 UTC
Service impact : During the operation, customers will face latency to access their websites.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update on our Web servers.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - All clusters maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 20:18 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 30, 18:16 UTC
Update - The maintenance has been finished for all Clusters except Cluster024.
The maintenance is still ongoing for Cluster024.

Apr 30, 16:10 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 30, 16:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer for all clusters.

Start time : 30/04/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 20:00 UTC
Service impact : During the operation, customers will face latency to access their websites.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update for the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative Solutions] - MX Plan/Webmail Roundcube maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 14:26 UTC
Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and she will be rescheduled later.

Apr 30, 12:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Webmail offering.

Start time : 04/05/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 11:00 UTC
Service impact : All active Roundcube sessions will be reset during the maintenance, customers will need to log back into the webmail after the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an update on our Webmail offering.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 13:20 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 30, 13:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Zimbra offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 09:30 UTC
End time : 05/05/2026 09:30 UTC
Service impact : Each customer will be temporarily unable to send, receive emails and access their Zimbra mailbox for 10 minutes during the operation.
Please note that emails received during the 10 minutes impact will be stored and delivered after the time of impact.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Zimbra servers.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster121 - Filerz10002 maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 11:20 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Web Hosting is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Apr 30, 07:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 29, 18:29 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer on Cluster121 - Filerz10002.

Start time : 30/04/2026 07:30 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 09:30 UTC
Service impact : Filerz10001 will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update for the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

List of concerned Filerz:

- Cluster121 - Filerz10002

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - SSH and FTP Unavailable in all Cluster
item.description:
Apr 30, 09:19 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting has been resolved.

Start time : 30/04/2026 08:18 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 09:18 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 08:49 UTC
Identified - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue in all clusters.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 08:18 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : SSH and FTP access is unavailable across all customer in all clusters.
These protocols are no longer available.
Customers Impact : Customers are currently unable to access their services via SSH or FTP.
File transfers and remote access operations using these protocols are impacted.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Web cloud Databases and CDN incident notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 08:16 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offer has been resolved.

Start time : 15/04/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 29/04/2026 14:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 29, 15:20 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 15/04/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Web Cloud Databases and CDN options cannot be ordered through the Manager.
Customer Impact : Customers are unable to place option orders via the Manager.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 27, 14:14 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in all regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 15/04/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Web Cloud Databases and CDN options cannot be ordered through the Manager.
Customer Impact : Customers are unable to place option orders via the Manager.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 27, 12:38 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 15/04/2026 08:00 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster123 - Filerz93 incident notification

End time : 29/04/2026 15:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 29, 14:07 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the Cluster123 - Filerz93.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 29/04/2026 13:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz93 is temporarily facing slowness on Web Hosting Cluster 123.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing slowness when trying to access and use their websites hosted on Cluster123 - Filerz93.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 102/103/106/107/110/111/114/120/121/126/127/130 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
Apr 29, 13:41 UTC
Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and she will be rescheduled later.

Apr 16, 18:58 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 04/05/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 21:59 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:
- Filerz1048 Cluster 130 / 04/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz169 Cluster 126 / 04/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz287 Cluster 127 / 04/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz347 Cluster 107 / 04/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz178 Cluster 126 / 04/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz44 Cluster 121 / 04/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz478 Cluster 102 / 04/05/2026 23:00 UTC
- Filerz51 Cluster 120 / 04/05/2026 23:30 UTC
- Filerz188 Cluster 126 / 05/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz512 Cluster 111 / 05/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz580 Cluster 114 / 05/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz638 Cluster 110 / 05/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz196 Cluster 126 / 05/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz535 Cluster 111 / 05/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz644 Cluster 110 / 05/05/2026 23:00 UTC
- Filerz728 Cluster 106 / 05/05/2026 23:30 UTC
- Filerz201 Cluster 126 / 06/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz538 Cluster 111 / 06/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz661 Cluster 110 / 06/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz873 Cluster 103 / 06/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz212 Cluster 126 / 07/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz541 Cluster 111 / 07/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz876 Cluster 103 / 07/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz548 Cluster 111 / 07/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz667 Cluster 110 / 07/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz878 Cluster 103 / 07/05/2026 23:00 UTC

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the web hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Customers Impact : Customers may experience slowness when sending or receiving emails.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra incident notification
item.description:
Apr 27, 07:55 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 26/04/2026 07:30 UTC
End time : 27/04/2026 07:46 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 27, 07:48 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 26/04/2026 07:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Zimbra mailbox is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are currently unable to access their mailboxes via webmail or email clients.
Sending and receiving emails is temporarily unavailable.
Emails sent or received during the incident will be queued and delivered once the situation is resolved.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
